description_long: This object consists of four blue rectangular storage boxes, each with a grid-like pattern on the exterior surfaces. The boxes are open-topped, revealing spacious interiors, and are shown in a loosely stacked arrangement, with one box partially nested inside another and two others placed nearby. The material appears to be a sturdy, semi-rigid plastic or composite, with a matte finish and subtle surface texture. The boxes have no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and their design is simple and utilitarian. The color is a uniform deep blue, and the boxes are likely lightweight and easy to move. These storage boxes are suitable for organizing or storing items in urban environments such as garages, closets, or utility rooms.
description: A set of four blue, open-topped rectangular storage boxes with a grid-patterned exterior and matte finish, designed for practical storage and organization.
description_view_0: Two blue storage boxes are stacked, with one box placed at an angle on top and another box open beside them, showing the interior and grid-patterned sides.
description_view_1: The arrangement highlights the flat side of one box and the open interiors of two others, with one box set apart from the group.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the open tops and depth of the boxes, with one box leaning against the stack and another positioned in front.
description_view_3: The boxes are shown from above and slightly to the side, displaying the open interiors and the way they can be nested or grouped together.
